meaning: adj.未完成的,破灭的 vbl.undo的过去分词
examples: The team was undone by the speed and strength of their opponents.
Frazzled and furious women rage at their reclining-remote-grabbing men while so much work remains undone.
Orwell Undone With hindsight, we now see that 1957 was the apogee of command-and- control.
